result.stdout:
nuget mirror 4.0.0

Mirror a nuget v3 feed.

Usage: NuGetMirror [command] [options]

Options:
  -h|--help  Show help information.
  --version  Show version information.

Commands:
  list       List packages from a v3 source.
  nupkgs     Mirror nupkgs to a folder.

Run 'NuGetMirror [command] -h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
nuget mirror 4.0.0

Mirror a nuget v3 feed.

Usage: NuGetMirror [command] [options]

Options:
  -h|--help  Show help information.
  --version  Show version information.

Commands:
  list       List packages from a v3 source.
  nupkgs     Mirror nupkgs to a folder.

Run 'NuGetMirror [command] -h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
List packages from a v3 source.

Usage: NuGetMirror list [options] <[root]>

Arguments:
  [root]        V3 feed index.json URI

Options:
  -s|--start    Beginning of the commit time range. Packages commited AFTER this
                time will be included.
  -e|--end      End of the commit time range. Packages commited at this time
                will be included.
  -v|--verbose  Write out additional network call information.
  -h|--help     Show help information.

commands.payload:
List packages from a v3 source.

Usage: NuGetMirror list [options] <[root]>

Arguments:
  [root]        V3 feed index.json URI

Options:
  -s|--start    Beginning of the commit time range. Packages commited AFTER this
                time will be included.
  -e|--end      End of the commit time range. Packages commited at this time
                will be included.
  -v|--verbose  Write out additional network call information.
  -h|--help     Show help information.

result.stdout:
Mirror nupkgs to a folder.

Usage: NuGetMirror nupkgs [options] <[root]>

Arguments:
  [root]               V3 feed index.json URI or a locally configured source
                       name

Options:
  -o|--output          Output directory for nupkgs.
  --folder-format      Output folder format. Defaults to v3. Options: (v2|v3)
  --ignore-errors      Continue on errors.
  --delay              Avoid downloading the very latest packages on the feed to
                       avoid errors. This value is in minutes. Default: 10
  --max-threads        Maximum number of concurrent downloads. Default: 8
  --verbose            Output additional network information.
  -i|--include-id      Include only these package ids or wildcards. May be
                       provided multiple times.
  -e|--exclude-id      Exclude these package ids or wildcards. May be provided
                       multiple times.
  --additional-output  Additional output directory for nupkgs. The output path
                       with the most free space will be used.
  --latest-only        Include only the latest version of that package in the
                       result
  --stable-only        Include only stable versions of that package in the
                       result
  --start              Beginning of the commit time range. Packages commited
                       AFTER this time will be included. (The cursor value will
                       not be used with this option.)
  --end                End of the commit time range. Packages commited at this
                       time will be included.
  -h|--help            Show help information.

commands.payload:
Mirror nupkgs to a folder.

Usage: NuGetMirror nupkgs [options] <[root]>

Arguments:
  [root]               V3 feed index.json URI or a locally configured source
                       name

Options:
  -o|--output          Output directory for nupkgs.
  --folder-format      Output folder format. Defaults to v3. Options: (v2|v3)
  --ignore-errors      Continue on errors.
  --delay              Avoid downloading the very latest packages on the feed to
                       avoid errors. This value is in minutes. Default: 10
  --max-threads        Maximum number of concurrent downloads. Default: 8
  --verbose            Output additional network information.
  -i|--include-id      Include only these package ids or wildcards. May be
                       provided multiple times.
  -e|--exclude-id      Exclude these package ids or wildcards. May be provided
                       multiple times.
  --additional-output  Additional output directory for nupkgs. The output path
                       with the most free space will be used.
  --latest-only        Include only the latest version of that package in the
                       result
  --stable-only        Include only stable versions of that package in the
                       result
  --start              Beginning of the commit time range. Packages commited
                       AFTER this time will be included. (The cursor value will
                       not be used with this option.)
  --end                End of the commit time range. Packages commited at this
                       time will be included.
  -h|--help            Show help information.
